notes: Regular-season 4th-down plays over 10 seasons (fakes are rare). Fake detection is heuristic on pbp.desc: matches 'fake punt' / 'fake field goal' text or a pass/run executed by the punter/holder on a 4th-down punt/FG situation. Denominator is all 4th-down plays where a punt/FG was lined up (punt attempts + fake punts, FG attempts + fake FGs). first_down_success_rate is the conversion rate on the fake.
